Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}H-Hey, man. Sorry to make you come here. I, um... Ah, damn it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Dude, it's bad! I don't know what to do![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}The school found out about Emiri and me! It blew up and became this huge thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And now she's being transferred to a school in Kyushu. What do I do!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 2 5 101}Yeah, yeah, that's what I was thinking! I mean, I want to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Except I feel like she's totally avoiding me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Wh-What the hell, dude!? You're the only one I can count on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It's like, all of a sudden, she won't answer my calls or reply to my texts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}She's probably only doing this to protect me, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I can't just sit here and do nothing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I gotta think of a plan. And I'm gonna need your help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika opened up to[n]me about his troubles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'll see ya soon. Thanks for hearing me out today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Tomochika[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
